summary: Tested Announcement Bar positioning and Popup Modal feature. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed: announcement bar correctly positioned above navbar (z-index 60, y=0), header adjusts position with 'with-announcement' class (top=44px), popup modal appears after 4 seconds only on homepage, modal dismissible via X button, session storage prevents re-display. Admin panel popup modal management fully functional.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (console warning)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/popup-modal returns null when empty
Backend: GET /api/popup-modal/admin returns null when empty
Backend: POST /api/popup-modal creates popup modal successfully
Backend: GET /api/popup-modal returns active modal
Backend: GET /api/popup-modal/admin returns modal regardless of status
Backend: PUT /api/popup-modal/toggle toggles active status (on/off)
Backend: PUT /api/popup-modal/toggle returns 404 when no modal
Backend: POST /api/popup-modal updates existing modal (same ID reused)
Backend: DELETE /api/popup-modal removes modal
Backend: DELETE /api/popup-modal returns 404 when no modal
Backend: POST /api/popup-modal validates title min length (422)
Backend: POST /api/popup-modal validates body min length (422)
Backend: Deactivated modal not returned by frontend API
Backend: POST /api/popup-modal uses correct defaults (delay_seconds=4, is_active=true)
Frontend: Announcement bar positioned at top (y=0)
Frontend: Announcement bar has z-index 60
Frontend: Header positioned below announcement bar (top=44px)
Frontend: Header has 'with-announcement' class when bar visible
Frontend: Popup modal appears after 4 seconds on homepage
Frontend: Popup modal shows title, body, image, CTA button correctly
Frontend: Popup modal close button (X) works
Frontend: Popup modal backdrop overlay present
Frontend: Modal doesn't reappear after dismiss (session flag)
Frontend: Popup modal does NOT appear on /programs page
Frontend: Popup modal does NOT appear on /about page
Admin: Login with password works
Admin: Announcements tab shows Popup Modal section
Admin: Edit Modal button opens form dialog
Admin: Popup modal card shows Active badge and delay
Admin: Activate/Deactivate toggle works with toast notification
Admin: Delete button visible for modal management
critical_code_review_comments: PopupModal.jsx correctly uses location.pathname === '/' check to only show on homepage
Session storage flag (popup_modal_shown) prevents modal from reappearing after dismiss
AnnouncementBar uses fixed positioning with z-index 60 for proper layering
Header.jsx properly applies 'with-announcement' class when isAnnouncementVisible is true
CSS sets top: 44px for header when with-announcement class is applied
Minor accessibility improvement needed: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent in admin panel
seed_data_creation: Created test popup modal for frontend testing - will remain active
context_for_next_testing_agent: Announcement bar and popup modal features fully tested. Announcement bar appears at y=0 with z-index 60, header adjusts to top=44px when bar visible. Popup modal shows after 4 seconds ONLY on homepage, not on other routes. Modal can be dismissed with X button or backdrop click, session storage prevents re-display. Admin panel has Popup Modal section in Announcements tab with full CRUD (create/read/update/delete) and activate/deactivate toggle. Backend APIs: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE at /api/popup-modal work correctly.

header_adjustment: Header has 'with-announcement' class when bar visible
CSS sets top: 44px when class applied
popup_modal_admin: Form fields: title, body, image_url, cta_text, cta_link, delay_seconds
popup_modal_backend_apis: GET /api/popup-modal/admin - returns modal regardless of status
